steps.title: Enter the table in Desmos
steps.content: This is a table-to-equation question, so the fastest calculator method is linear regression. Enter the table as $x_1=[1,2,3,4]$ and $y_1=[5,7,9,11]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=2$ and $b=3$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: The regression values give $$y=2x+3.$$ You can also see this by hand: every time $x$ increases by $1$, $y$ increases by $2$, so the slope is $2$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A is correct. A quick point check confirms it: when $x=1$, $2(1)+3=5$, and when $x=4$, $2(4)+3=11$.
